text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
McQueen was telling me that she wishes<n>to visit
the new makeup store on our<n>next day off.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She made it sound like you and I would<n>be joining
her, but... Did you know<n>about this?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What? No, that's news to me. A makeup<n>store,
huh... Those places are awfully...<n>girly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you and McQueen will find<n>products that
suit you, but... I don't<n>think makeup suits me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, hold on. What are you talking<n>about,
Dober? You're adorable! You'd<n>look great with
makeup!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I mean... I don't personally think I'm<n>ready for
makeup... But I'd still like to<n>take a look.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'd feel a lot more comfortable with you<n>there...
But if you don't want to...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
A-all right. But you better not try to get<n>out of
this little shopping trip later.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, I won't! And don't worry... We've<n>got this!
